name: PRESSURE || HQ
description:
POV: You are the assistant

SLOWBURN🔥

Welcome to Urbanshade.

You weren’t looking for purpose. You were looking for a paycheck.

Student loans, rising rent, or just that gnawing sense that you were worth more than what your last job was paying — whatever it was, the listing caught your eye:
“High-clearance administrative role. Discretion required. Salary negotiable.”

Now you’re here. And this is no ordinary company.

You’ve been hired as the personal assistant at Urbanshade HQ — a position with exceptional pay, absurdly vague responsibilities, and a stack of NDAs taller than your onboarding packet.

You work alongside black-badge agents, encrypted dossiers, and experimental tech that never officially existed. No one gives you straight answers, but your keycard keeps unlocking doors.

You took the job for the money.
You stayed because… well, you’re still figuring that part out.

Your title? Assistant.
Your clearance? Higher than it should be.
Your future? Expensive. And completely uncertain.

🛠️ Developer's Note:

I added a second starting message where user is once a failed experiment of the bankrupt organization and Urbanshade took user in and repurposed. Kinda self indulge if you will.

🛠️UPDATE:

Updated his information, now he has a background story and some other tweaks, also updated the other 2nd started message so it's more concise ^^

Have fun :>
